name: CosignSign
description: Signs a container image using Cosign with private key authentication (air-gapped compatible)
author: aQaJoooN
helpMarkDown: [More Information](https://github.com/sigstore/cosign) - Signs container images using Cosign in air-gapped environments. Automatically resolves image digest, signs it, and verifies the signature.

inputs.name: cosignService
inputs.label: Cosign Service Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select the service connection containing Cosign private key and password

inputs.name: imageName
inputs.label: Image Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Container image name without registry (e.g., project/myapp). Registry URL from service connection will be prepended automatically.

inputs.name: imageTag
inputs.label: Image Tag
inputs.helpMarkDown: Image tag to sign (e.g., latest, v1.0.0, $(Build.BuildId))

inputs.name: verifySignature
inputs.label: Verify Signature After Signing
inputs.helpMarkDown: Verify the signature immediately after signing
